root_causes.label: Successfully / Completed Successfully
recommendations: Add disk utilization alerts at 80 % / 90 % thresholds and schedule automated cleanup jobs.
sample_resolutions: Change completed successfully.
Change completed successfully.
Change completed successfully.

root_causes.label: Firewall / Updated
recommendations: Review firewall rule changes, implement network topology documentation, and set up synthetic monitoring.
Enforce canary/blue-green deployments and automated rollback triggers for failed health checks.
sample_resolutions: Re-enrolled devices in MDM and reset Exchange ActiveSync
Identified BGP route flapping; stabilised routing
Firewall rule not updated after email server migration Updated firewall rule to allow SMTP from new server subnet

root_causes.label: Leak / Vpn
recommendations: Profile the application for memory leaks, tune JVM/container memory limits, and set OOM alerts.
Review firewall rule changes, implement network topology documentation, and set up synthetic monitoring.
sample_resolutions: Memory leak in VPN gateway firmware v3.2.1
Memory leak in VPN gateway firmware v3.2.1 Upgraded VPN gateway firmware to resolve memory leak
Upgraded VPN gateway firmware to resolve memory leak

root_causes.label: System / Hr
recommendations: Implement self-service password reset and proactive account expiry notifications.
sample_resolutions: HR system de-provisioning job running with wrong OU filter Reset accounts and identified sync issue with HR system
Reset accounts and identified sync issue with HR system
HR system de-provisioning job running with wrong OU filter

root_causes.label: Log / Log Rotation
sample_resolutions: Removed old log files and increased log rotation frequency
CA bundle not propagated after certificate authority rotation Re-distributed new CA bundle to all microservices
Log rotation policy misconfigured; logs not purged for 60 days Removed old log files and increased log rotation frequency

root_causes.label: Load / Load Balancer
recommendations: Set up automated certificate expiry monitoring with alerts at 30/14/7 days before expiry.
sample_resolutions: Fixed broken redirect URL after load balancer update
Renewed SSL certificate and deployed to load balancer
Load balancer SSL termination changed callback URL scheme

root_causes.label: Index / Query
sample_resolutions: Rebuilt missing index on orders table; query time reduced from 45s to 0.3s
Ad-hoc reporting query without index caused full table scan
Index dropped accidentally during schema migration Rebuilt missing index on orders table; query time reduced from 45s to 0.3s

root_causes.label: Query / Optimised
sample_resolutions: Prometheus retention config wiped after upgrade Re-enabled remote write and fixed Prometheus retention config
Enabled query caching and optimised N+1 query patterns
Enabled query caching and optimised N+1 query patterns

root_causes.label: Volume / Backup
recommendations: Test backup restoration monthly, document RTO/RPO targets, and automate backup validation.
sample_resolutions: Backup volume not sized for growing dataset Extended volume size and cleared orphaned backup files
Backup volume not sized for growing dataset Extended volume size and cleared orphaned backup files
Backup volume not sized for growing dataset Extended volume size and cleared orphaned backup files

root_causes.label: Order / Lock
sample_resolutions: Inconsistent lock acquisition order between two concurrent transactions Reviewed lock ordering in stored procedures, fixed transaction order
Inconsistent lock acquisition order between two concurrent transactions Reviewed lock ordering in stored procedures, fixed transaction order
Inconsistent lock acquisition order between two concurrent transactions Reviewed lock ordering in stored procedures, fixed transaction order

root_causes.unresolved_insight: 92 ticket(s) remain open. 14 are P1 (critical). 83 have been open for more than 7 days.

recommendations.finding: P1 SLA breached 28.6% of the time
recommendations.action: Review P1 escalation path, on-call coverage, and runbook completeness.
Escalate open P1 incidents immediately; conduct a bridge call if multiple services affected.

recommendations.finding: Recurring pattern: 'Users Locked / Users Issues' (20 tickets, trend: Stable)
recommendations.action: Open a Problem ticket to address root cause. Top keywords: users locked, users, multiple users. Primarily affects: Email & Messaging, Customer Portal.

recommendations.finding: Recurring pattern: 'Database / Severely Issues' (16 tickets, trend: Stable)
recommendations.action: Open a Problem ticket to address root cause. Top keywords: database, severely, performance. Primarily affects: Data Warehouse, ERP System.

recommendations.finding: Recurring pattern: 'Reported / Vpn Disconnections Issues' (16 tickets, trend: Stable)
recommendations.action: Open a Problem ticket to address root cause. Top keywords: reported, vpn disconnections, vpn. Primarily affects: ERP System, CI/CD Pipeline.

recommendations.finding: Root cause cluster: 'Successfully / Completed Successfully' (60 tickets)
recommendations.action: Add disk utilization alerts at 80 % / 90 % thresholds and schedule automated cleanup jobs.
Review firewall rule changes, implement network topology documentation, and set up synthetic monitoring.
Enforce canary/blue-green deployments and automated rollback triggers for failed health checks.
Profile the application for memory leaks, tune JVM/container memory limits, and set OOM alerts.

recommendations.finding: 55.3% of resolved tickets have no root cause recorded
recommendations.action: Enforce root cause capture in closure workflow; add mandatory field to ticket resolution form.
